dialogs.script:
say: Thank you again, {player}.
say: You're a true friend.

say: You found her?!
say: She's on Route 1? Thank goodness!
say: Thank you so much, {player}!
say: I promised you Pokeballs, and here they are!
giveitem: potion 3
giveitem: pokeball 5
setflag: quest1_complete
clearflag: quest1_found_cici

say: Please hurry, {player}!
say: Find my daughter on Route 1!
say: She's wearing a red dress.

say: Please...
say: I'll even give you Pokeballs if you find her!
say: Will you at least try?
setflag: quest1_refused_oldman
choice: Will you find my daughter?
clearflag: quest1_refused_oldman
setflag: quest1_find_daughter

say: Oh, {player}!
say: Have you seen my daughter?
say: She went north to Route 1 and hasn't returned!
setflag: quest1_refused_oldman
choice: Will you find my daughter?
clearflag: quest1_refused_oldman
setflag: quest1_find_daughter
